sources.name: Alan Jones Road Age-Grade Tables (2025)
sources.notes: Per-distance factor tables (ages 5-99) + open-class M/F standards. Marathon taken from AgeGrade.42k (42.195 km).

sources.name: WMA 2023 Rulebook Appendix B one-year age factors
sources.notes: One-year running age factors for 100m-1500m, ages 30-110; ages 20-29 set to factor 1.0 and the table is floored at age 20.

sources.name: World Athletics outdoor world records (open standards)
sources.notes: Standard outdoor record used where a short-track variant also exists.

notes: Committed CSVs are the runtime source of truth; this manifest is bumped on regeneration. Road wins where a distance exists in both surfaces; track applies below the 1-mile (1609.344 m) road floor.
